title: Electric Candle Lighter Long Reach Rechargeable USB C Lighters Electronic Arc Plasma Lighter with Long Flexible Neck for Scented Candles, BBQ, Camping, Grill - Gifts for Women Her Mom
features: ⭐Safety Protection & Design ▶ [Child Safety Lock]: You need to slide out the safety lock first, then press the button to generate sparks. After sliding out the safety lock, if the usb lighter is not used in 10s, the lighter will automatically power off. [6s Auto Off] the spark will stop automatically after 6 seconds of ignition

⭐Long Flexible Neck ▶ The electric candle lighter’s length is 26cm,longer enough to reach the items you want to ignite. 9cm and 360° rotatable flexible long reach neck for widely use, such as deep cup candles, gas stoves, fireworks, barbecue, camping. This electric lighter is an essential tool for family use
⭐LED Battery Display ▶ Four battery indicators can display real time battery volume, when charging,the indicators will flash, when 4 LED lights all keep on, it is fully charged
⭐USB C Rechargeable ▶ This electric usb c lighter built with a Type-C charging port,also comes with a USB C charging cable.More convenient than those Type-A lighters

⭐Wind & Splash Proof ▶ This candle lighters long reach adopts plasma arc windproof flameless technology, instead of using butane, no flame, eco-friendy& resuable, it's the best choose for indoor and outdoor activities
⭐After-sale Service ▶ 120 days guarantee,if you aren't love our electronic candle lighter or any questions,please free to contact us,we are ready to help,we will give a suitable solution

⭐Gifts for Women ▶ This electric candle lighter is an ideal gift for women, perfectly designed for igniting scented candles, an exquisite and considerate gift for women mom girlfriend, making it a beautiful and functional accessory for home
